response.justification: Wei Chen is a capable full-stack engineer with 15+ years of broad experience across web, systems, and cloud work, but the role requires 8+ years of production-grade AI solution delivery—a bar this resume does not come close to meeting. The only AI-adjacent work appears in the current role at re:cinq (April 2025, roughly one month of tenure), involving MCP code generators and agentic workflow tooling. Python, the dominant language in the AI/ML ecosystem and a primary requirement for this position, is entirely absent from the resume. There is no evidence of RAG architectures, vector databases, LLM evaluation pipelines, or multi-agent frameworks, all of which are core to the Staff GenAI role.
strengths: 15+ years of engineering experience across distributed systems, cloud (AWS CDK), and TypeScript demonstrates solid production engineering fundamentals
Recent MCP (Model Context Protocol) tooling and agentic workflow contributions at re:cinq show emerging engagement with the AI infrastructure space
Staff-level roles with community workshops, open-source leadership, and public speaking align with the mentoring and technical-leadership expectations of the position
concerns: Python is entirely absent from the resume; it is a primary required language for AI/ML development in this role
No demonstrated experience with RAG architectures, vector databases, LLM evaluation pipelines, or multi-agent frameworks such as LangGraph or CrewAI
AI-specific work is limited to approximately one month (April 2025 onward), representing a critical gap against the 8+ year AI solution delivery requirement

key_factors.factor: Absent RAG and vector DB experience
